perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator appears on screen with a PiP video of a man eating colorful rice cakes in milk; she looks curious and excited. (2) She presents several retail packages of glutinous rice balls (Tangyuan) including brands like Ovaltine and Sanrio-themed packs, then shows a halved strawberry Daifuku. (3) She pours banana milk and oat milk into a large glass bowl, then adds the cooked Tangyuan and Daifuku. (4) She uses a large spoon and chopsticks to eat the items, displaying exaggerated facial expressions of surprise, delight, and concentration. (5) She lifts the large bowl to drink the remaining milk mixture and points towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately with a high-pitched, energetic female voice greeting the audience. (2) The sound of liquid pouring into a bowl is heard briefly over the music. (3) Short vocal interjections and chewing sounds occur as the speaker tastes different foods. (4) The music maintains a constant cheerful rhythm throughout the entire clip, ending with a final enthusiastic sentence from the female speaker.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '韓國 & 美國 爆紅吃法' (Korean & American Viral Way to Eat) - informative hook. (2) Decorative Text: '🌈 彩虹年糕加牛奶 🥛' - descriptive with emojis. (3) Content Text: '意外有那種流沙包的鹹蛋味道!!!' (Surprisingly has that custard bun salted egg flavor!!!) - emotional reaction. (4) Functional Text: '大家最好奇哪一個組合的口味呢？' (Which combo are you most curious about?) - interactive call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Trend Introduction -> Ingredient Display -> Preparation -> Tasting/Reaction -> Conclusion/Question

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on-screen, 1 male visible in the PiP (Picture-in-Picture) video overlay.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with long brown wavy hair, wearing a white long-sleeve top under a red and pink floral patterned vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home or studio interior with white walls, featuring a colorful 'Happiness is coming' poster and a multi-colored wall clock.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Ingredients -> Process -> Tasting -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain and inform viewers by testing a popular international food trend (eating rice cakes in milk) using local supermarket products found in Taiwan. The creator provides a subjective review of various flavor combinations to satisfy audience curiosity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator reviews multiple competing brands and products from a personal perspective without explicit promotional language.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'Experiment Oni' (實驗歐膩) persona, constant use of colorful text overlays and expressive reactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content leverages cross-platform cultural exchange by localizing a trend seen on global TikTok/Reels for a specific regional audience.
